title: Incorrect Most Significant Bit Count in Binary Representation

statement.markdown: Given an integer `n`, count the number of trailing bits (i.e., `2^0` to `2^(31)` in a 32-bit integer), which are set to 1 in its binary representation. If `n` is zero, return 0.
statement.notes: Return the count of leading ones.

hints.text: Count the number of leading ones in the binary representation of the number.
